subject: fix(mobile): second snapPoint falsy-zero in animation effect
body:
The effectiveSnap variable was fixed to use ?? on line 59, but the snap
animation effect on line 74 still used snapPoint || SNAP_HALF. When
snapPoint is SNAP_CLOSED (0), || treats it as falsy and animates to
SNAP_HALF instead of staying closed. Consistent with the same fix
already applied to effectiveSnap.

Tags: mobile, bugfix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: branch-audit
Semver: patch
